html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Winter's Feast

The Gingerbread Pigs are Mobs that were introduced in 2019. When player approach, they will escape and leave a trace of Cookie Crumbles. In a similar way to Suspicious Dirt Piles, the player can follow the lead of a Gingerbread Pig until the end is reached. There will be an 80% chance to find 3 to 5 Gingerbread Pig Houses and a 20% chance to find a Gingerbread Varg.

Gingerbread Pigs can be killed for 3 Cookie Crumbles and one Holiday Cheer.

Gingerbread Pig House

The Gingerbread Pig House was introduced in 2019. They have an 80% chance to appear after following a Gingerbread Pig. They can be hammered for five Cookie Crumbles and 1-2 Holiday Cheer.

Upon destruction, a cowering Gingerbread Pig can appear, but it dies quickly without dropping anything. They can be spawned in with the code "gingerdeadpig".

Trivia

  • The burnt Gingerbread Pig House will restore to its non-burnt form after the area is unloaded or the server is restarted.

Gallery

  • 1 Burnt
  • 2 Burnt
  • 4 Burnt
  • 3 Burnt
  • A Gingerbread Pig village from the Hook, Line, and Inker update trailer.
  • A Gingerbread Varg attacking Gingerbread Pigs from the Hook, Line, and Inker update trailer.
  • Concept art for Hook, Line and Inker update trailer.
  • Gingerbread Pigs maked by Klei [1]
  • On limited Pig House Gingerbread Mold
  • On limited Pig House Gingerbread Mold
  • On limited Pig House Gingerbread Mold
  • On limited Pig House Gingerbread Mold

</gallery>

“I'd better follow him.”
–Wilson
“Hey get back here!”
–Willow
“Hehe! Come back, little guy!”
–Wolfgang
“No one wants to be my friend.”
–Wendy
“HA HA. IT IS A MOCKERY OF LIFE”
–WX-78
“If it would sit still long enough, I could classify it.”
–Wickerbottom
“Where ya goin', eh?”
–Woodie
“Must you make me chase you?”
–Maxwell
“Yöu shall nöt escape me!!”
–Wigfrid
“Come back! Come back!!!”
–Webber
“I can catch you, gingerbread pig!”
–Warly
“Come back, friend!”
–Wormwood
“Hey cookie, what's the rush?”
–Winona
“Here little piggy!”
–Wortox
“No mercy for tiny Cookie-Pigfolk!”
–Wurt
“Is that cookie alive?!”
–Walter
“Oh, these are the ones that run!”
–Wanda
The Gingerbread Pigs are Mobs that were introduced in 2019. When player approach, they will escape and leave a trace of Cookie Crumbles. In a similar way to Suspicious Dirt Piles, the player can follow the lead of a Gingerbread Pig until the end is reached. There will be an 80% chance to find 3 to 5 Gingerbread Pig Houses and a 20% chance to find a Gingerbread Varg.
Gingerbread Pigs can be killed for 3 Cookie Crumbles and one Holiday Cheer.

“Room and board all rolled into one.”
–Wilson
“I almost don't want to burn this one.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will punch it for the candy.”
–Wolfgang
“Temporary joy, meant to be consumed.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE AN IRRESISTIBLE URGE TO STOMP ON IT”
–WX-78
“Reminds me of a story I know.”
–Wickerbottom
“I prefer my houses made of wood.”
–Woodie
“Entirely too gaudy.”
–Maxwell
“Neither a höuse nör a meal I will enjöy.”
–Wigfrid
“Let's eat it!”
–Webber
“The piping on those roofs - magnifique!”
–Warly
“Yummy house. Mmmmm!”
–Wormwood
“Better as a dessert than a dwelling.”
–Winona
“What a charming cookie cottage.”
–Wortox
“Anybody home?”
–Wurt
“What do they do when it rains?”
–Walter
“It's so tastefully decorated!”
–Wanda
The Gingerbread Pig House was introduced in 2019. They have an 80% chance to appear after following a Gingerbread Pig. They can be hammered for five Cookie Crumbles and 1-2 Holiday Cheer.
Upon destruction, a cowering Gingerbread Pig can appear, but it dies quickly without dropping anything. They can be spawned in with the code "gingerdeadpig".
